description: Identify, classify, and provide the correct value for all data quality errors

grading.description: Exact match for corrected_value, 0.5 credit for close numeric values

prompt_template: Review the dataset, identify all errors, and provide corrected values. Respond with JSON: {"fixes": [{"row_id": N, "column": "...", "error_type": "...", "current_value": "...", "corrected_value": "..."}, ...]}

expected_output_format.fixes: list of {row_id, column, error_type, current_value, corrected_value}
